title: Hemomancy
description: Blood Magic reimagined for new adventures
body:
# **What this** > **Hemomancy is a large-scale and cinematic reimagining of the legendary Blood Magic mod, author WayOfTime, ported to modern versions of Minecraft. This is not just an update, but a full-fledged rebirth of the iconic fashion, reinterpreted and significantly expanded by the author easynull.** > > **Plunge into the dark world of hematomancy, the magic of blood, where strength is measured at a sacrificial price, and power is gained through risk and austerity. Explore a complex and deep system of rituals, alchemy, and the creation of magical artifacts that has become a benchmark for an entire generation of mods.** # **Downloads** >### The mod can be installed both on the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hemomancy-bm) page and on the [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hemomancy) page >

> > > > >

> >#### To use this mod, you need to download the API - [NullCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullcore/versions) (only 1.21.4 NeoForge) # **Features** >### A redesign and update of the Blood Orbs you might be used to seeing here. They contain sparks of memories. > ![Blood Orbs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9xYBOqro/images/bfca9f2897474072d3e4e27e70dd2b2b24b14a7d.png) >### Redesign and update of the Slate collection, our new name is Glyphs. > ![Glyphs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9xYBOqro/images/ef1031dce086557a0a203921840b7cc0b02c93c1.png) >### Sigils have been redesigned with all possible compatibility and balance. Experience their potential anew! > ![Sigils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9xYBOqro/images/05aab6aa82cbff7f472baf1bf7dd5dce3ee79724.png) >### A new and important element of the Hemomancy mod: Crimson Steel. Infuse metal with crimson blood! > ![Crimson Steel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9xYBOqro/images/c79837e21ad1971c2e223f9d832c1f5416095603.png) >### New structure of Blood Altar tiers! > # **Licensing** >### The license uses the terms of the Blood Magic licenses(CC-BY-4.0) and is fully obligated to comply with them. # **Contacts** >### Email address: [easynulll@gmail.com](mailto:easynulll@gmail.com) >### Github issues: [link to](https://github.com/easynull/Hemomancy/issues) # **For developers** >To connect your project's dependency to **Hemomancy** you need to write this code in your **```build.gradle```** >```Java >repositories { > //from Modrinth: > maven { > name = "Modrinth" > url = "https://api.modrinth.com/maven" > } > //from CurseForge: > maven { url "https://cursemaven.com"} >} > >dependencies { > //from Modrinth: > implementation "maven.modrinth:hemomancy:${hemomancy_version}" > //from CurseForge: > implementation "curse.maven:hemomancy-1340370:${hemomancy_file_id}" >} >```
